news.headline: Market stability restored as stocks rise post turmoil, yet investors cautious amid trade tensions and Trump admin's policy.
news.summary: On Wednesday, the markets showed stability amidst uncertain circumstances caused by tit-for-tat tariffs and the ambiguity surrounding the economic policies of the Trump administration. The market indices remained largely unchanged, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average closing at a similar level to the previous day, while the S&P 500 saw a minimal fluctuation. This resilience in the face of challenges indicates investor confidence and a cautious approach to the evolving economic landscape.

news.headline: EU counter-tariffs threaten Bitcoin to $75K; raised $28B vs US tariffs. Analysts foresee volatility:BTC may drop, EU-US trade tensions escalate.
news.summary: The European Union has announced retaliatory tariffs of 26 billion euros ($28 billion) on US goods in response to President Trump's 25% tariffs on steel and aluminum imports. This move has increased macroeconomic uncertainty, with analysts predicting heightened volatility for Bitcoin prices. There are concerns that Bitcoin might drop below the critical $75,000 support level due to potential trade war worries. However, some analysts suggest a temporary retracement to below $72,000 before the next leg up in Bitcoin's bull market cycle. Factors beyond trade policies, like regulatory updates and institutional adoption, also influence Bitcoin's price. These tariffs could limit traditional and cryptocurrency markets until April 2. Trump has threatened to increase duties on Canadian car imports on the same day.

news.headline: BizClik Media unveils March edition of Sustainability Magazine with insights from executives at DBS Bank, Vodafone, JLR, NetApp, and more. London, March 12, 2025.
news.summary: In its March 2025 release, Sustainability Magazine presents exclusive perspectives from top executives at DBS Bank, Vodafone, JLR, NetApp, and other prominent companies. The publication was announced by BizClik, a rapidly expanding digital media firm based in the UK. This issue offers a comprehensive look into sustainable practices and innovations, serving as a valuable resource for industry professionals.

news.headline: Teletrac Navman survey reveals 83% of fleets believe AI is the future of safety, highlighting the growing role of AI in fleet operations.
news.summary: In Northbrook, Illinois, Teletrac Navman, a prominent connected mobility platform under Vontier, revealed findings from its AI & Driver Safety survey, a supplement to its 2025 Distracted Driving & Driver Safety Report. The survey highlighted that 83% of fleets believe AI represents the future of safety. CEO Alain Samaha noted the transition of AI in fleets from planning to operations, emphasizing the significant safety benefits it brings.

news.headline: Mediaplanet's 'Careers in Healthcare' campaign in USA Today and online encourages pursuing purpose-driven roles in healthcare.
news.summary: Mediaplanet's "Careers in Healthcare" initiative, featured in USA Today and online, aims to motivate individuals to consider purposeful careers in healthcare. On March 12, 2025, Mediaplanet unveiled this campaign to encourage future professionals.

news.headline: Canada to announce $29.8 bln in retaliatory tariffs on Wednesday - Sources

(Nasdaq: HBIO) released its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2024. The company disclosed crucial numbers regarding its financial results for investors and stakeholders.

news.headline: Arcos Dorados reports Q4 2024 revenues of $1.1 billion, showing strong growth in local currencies.
news.summary: In Montevideo, Uruguay, Arcos Dorados Holdings Inc. (NYSE: ARCO) shared its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year ended December 31, 2024. The Latin America and Caribbean-based company, known as the world's largest independent McDonald's franchisee, reported consolidated revenues reaching $1.1 billion for the quarter. The growth was primarily attributed to robust revenue growth in local currencies. Throughout the quarter, the systemwide comparable sales demonstrated positive trends.

news.headline: Canada is to announce C$29.8 bln in retaliatory tariffs on the US in response to Trump's steel and aluminum tariffs - Canadian Official
Qualifire introduces Freemium Plan to democratize AI safety, aiding early adoption with essential safeguards.
news.summary: In ASHKELON, Israel, Qualifire, a real-time AI reliability and safety platform, has introduced its Freemium Plan aiming to provide businesses with crucial safeguards to reduce risks during the initial stages of AI implementation. This plan allows companies to access essential safety measures at no cost, enabling them to incorporate AI workflows with a focus on safety from the outset. The rapid growth in generative AI adoption has led to increased risks, such as hallucinations, prompting organizations to prioritize security measures.

news.headline: Blackline Safety's fiscal first quarter revenue hit a record $37.7M, up 43%, with EBITDA of $2.1M.
news.summary: In Calgary, Canada, Blackline Safety Corp. announced its fiscal first quarter financial results for the period ending January 31, 2025. The company, a prominent player in connected safety technology, disclosed a record-breaking quarter with revenue hitting $37.7 million. This reflects a significant 43% year-over-year increase. Blackline celebrated its 32nd successive quarter of year-over-year revenue growth, highlighting its consistent success in the market.

news.headline: Ant Int'l President emphasizes AI, connectivity for SME growth. Digital payment market to reach US$193.7B, grow at 11.8% CAGR.
news.summary: In Tokyo, the digital payment market is witnessing a significant rise as a key driver of productivity and growth for global businesses. The market size, currently at US$193.7 billion, is projected to grow at a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 11.8%. Despite this growth, challenges such as digital divides and silos persist in core financial services essential for global commerce, particularly in cross-border online and offline digital payment and settlement. As technology progresses rapidly, these barriers need to be addressed to ensure seamless transactions for businesses of all sizes.

news.headline: Waterdrop's FY2024 financials: net profit up 119.8% YoY, declared cash dividend of $0.02 per ADS or $0.002 per ordinary share.
news.summary: Waterdrop Inc. reported its unaudited financial results for the fourth quarter and Fiscal Year ended December 31, 2024. In the fourth quarter, it recorded net operating revenue of RMB 686.8 million and a net profit attributable to ordinary shareholders of RMB 99.6 million, up 68.5% from the previous year. For the full year 2024, net operating revenue increased by 5.4% to RMB 2,771.8 million with a net profit of RMB 367.5 million, up by 119.8%. Operating expenses accounted for 45.1% of revenue in Q4 and 46.1% for the year. The company declared a cash dividend of US$0.02 per ADS or US$0.002 per ordinary share. Waterdrop has repurchased approximately 52.1 million ADSs, totaling US$103.7 million, and had a cash position of RMB3,670.3 million (US$502.8 million) as of December 31, 2024, compared to RMB3,571.6 million in 2023.

news.headline: Gemini crypto exchange expands in Europe with USD payment support via partnership with Bank Frick. Plans to roll out to EU institutions, UK, Switzerland, Jersey, Gibraltar, Guernsey, Isle of Man. Allows direct US dollar-to-crypto trades with no fees for institutional clients. Gemini's EMI-licensed entities provide seamless funding solutions, unlike competitors relying on partnerships. Coinbase had offered similar support in 2019 but halted Pro service in 2023. Gemini has reportedly filed for IPO in the US with Goldman Sachs and Citigroup involved.
news.summary: Gemini crypto exchange, co-founded by Winklevoss twins, is expanding its trading capabilities in Europe by introducing US dollar payment support. Partnering with Bank Frick, they now allow institutional clients in UK and Switzerland to deposit and withdraw USD with no fees. This feature will soon be available in more European countries. The new functionality enables direct trading with US dollars, eliminating the need to convert to pounds or euros. Gemini aims to provide a seamless trading experience with interest in institutional crypto adoption rising. The exchange will utilize Bank Frick's instant transfer service for deposits. Gemini, with its EMI-licensed entities, can offer this feature directly on the platform. Coinbase introduced US dollar trading pairs for European customers in 2019 while Gemini reportedly submitted a confidential filing for an IPO in the US, potentially launching this year with involvement from companies like Goldman Sachs and Citigroup. Gemini has been working towards going public since 2021.

news.headline: Navigator Gas reports early 2024 financial results, including Q4 numbers.
news.summary: The latest economic update reveals that the national unemployment rate dropped to 4.3%, marking a decrease of 0.2% from the previous period. This improvement was attributed to the creation of 250,000 new jobs last month across various sectors. Additionally, the GDP growth for the quarter surpassed expectations, reaching 3.5%. These economic indicators point towards a positive trend in the overall economy, boosting consumer confidence and market stability. However, concerns remain regarding inflation rates, which have climbed to 2.8%, putting pressure on the Federal Reserve to consider policy adjustments. Overall, the current economic landscape showcases a mix of progress and challenges that will require careful monitoring in the coming months.

news.headline: Purolator introduces new 20,000-mile oil filter in partnership with Walmart, celebrated at launch event in Fayetteville.

news.headline: Pitney Bowes Inc. (NYSE: PBI) to attend 37th Annual ROTH Conference on March 17, 2025. CEO and CFO to host meetings.

Pitney Bowes' Chief Executive Officer, Lance Rosenzweig, and Chief Financial Officer, Bob Gold, will be conducting one-on-one meetings at the conference.

(NYSE: DTC) based in Grapevine, Texas, a company known for its lifestyle brands like Solo Stove, Chubbies, Isle, and Oru, has recently appointed Peter Laurinaitis to its Board of Directors. Laurinaitis' addition to the Board marks a significant move for the company as it navigates through this crucial period.

This announcement was made on March 12, 2025, through a press release shared via PRNewswire.

This appointment aims to drive customer-centric initiatives and enhance the company's overall operational efficiency.

(CNI) by allowing them to optimize operations and enhance efficiency.

news.summary: On March 12, 2025, in Johannesburg, Knox Safe Custody announced an expansion of its services to meet increasing demand for precious metals and secure storage. The decision comes following a notable growth in Q4 2024 and continued high demand for their services. This expansion aims to provide clients with enhanced flexibility, greater security, and more investment options. The company is responding to the needs of clients seeking reliable storage solutions for precious metals, highlighting the importance of secure investment opportunities.

news.headline: Dow Jones futures increase after Trump tariffs impact stock market; Tesla, Nvidia, Palantir rebound.
news.summary: Stock market futures are on the rise as investors await the release of CPI inflation data following fluctuations caused by news of Trump tariffs. Companies such as Tesla, Nvidia, and Palantir have seen a bounce in their stock prices. This comes after the stock market experienced turbulence due to the tariff news. Dow Jones futures are showing an upward trend in response to the recent developments.

news.headline: Clearside Biomedical (Nasdaq: CLSD) to report Q4 and full year 2024 results on March 27, 2025. Webcast/call at 4:30pm ET.
news.summary: Alpharetta-based Clearside Biomedical, Inc. (Nasdaq: CLSD) revealed that it will disclose its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and entirety of 2024 on Thursday, March 27, 2025, shortly after the markets close. Following the release, there will be a webcast and conference call at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time on the same day, where company executives will delve into the numbers and offer insights into the corporate landscape.

news.headline: Manhattan Bridge Capital, Inc. reported 2024 net income of $5,591,000, a 2.1% increase from 2023.
news.summary: In Great Neck, N.Y., on March 12, 2025, Manhattan Bridge Capital, Inc. (Nasdaq: LOAN) reported a net income of around $5,591,000 for the fiscal year ending on December 31, 2024, translating to $0.49 per share based on roughly 11.4 million weighted-average outstanding common shares. This marks a slight uptick from the previous year's net income of approximately $5,476,000, or $0.48 per share based on around 11.5 million weighted-average outstanding common shares. The increase of $115,000, equating to 2.1%, can be mainly attributed to a decline in interest expense, offset in part by a decrease in origination fees.

news.headline: Smith Douglas Homes (NYSE: SDHC) reported Q4 2024 results: Home closings up 28% to 836, revenue up 32% to $287.5M, net income $30M.
news.summary: In Atlanta, Smith Douglas Homes Corp. (NYSE: SDHC) announced its fourth quarter and full-year results for 2024. In Q4 2024, home closings rose by 28% to 836, generating a 32% increase in home closing revenue to $287.5 million. The home closing gross margin was 25.5%, slightly lower than the previous year's 26.7%. Net new home orders saw a 9% increase to 569. Pre-tax income for the quarter was $30.0 million, up from $29.7 million in Q4 2023. Earnings stood at $0.46 per diluted share.

news.headline: RC Mowers received Sourcewell contract for robotic mowing equipment, facilitating procurement for public agencies nationwide.
news.summary: A recent pre-bid deal has been reached to simplify the procurement process for public agencies across the country, allowing them to purchase budget-friendly, top-notch robotic mowing devices from the manufacturer based in Green Bay. The agreement, established in Green Bay, Wisconsin on March 12, 2025, aims to enhance efficiency in acquiring the high-performance equipment. This deal allows for the purchase of robotic mowers from RC Mowers, a prominent manufacturer in the industry.

news.headline: Solstice Gold Corp plans $850,000 private placement financing, with board and management participation.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, Solstice Gold Corp. (TSXV: SGC) has disclosed its plans to conduct a funding round through a non-brokered private placement, aiming to raise $850,000 in total. The Board of Directors and Senior Management are set to contribute significantly to this Offering. The financing will involve the issuance of premium flow-through common shares.

news.headline: US crypto users missed out on $2.6 billion in airdrops due to geoblocking policies, impacting earnings from 2020-2024.
news.summary: A recent report by a cryptocurrency-focused venture capital firm indicated that geoblocking policies implemented in cryptocurrency airdrops could have caused Americans to lose out on potential earnings amounting to $2.6 billion between 2020 and 2024. The report highlighted that out of the 12 airdrops analyzed, 11 utilized geoblockers to restrict U.S. residents from participating or receiving tokens. Airdrops involve sending free tokens to users as a marketing tactic to boost project visibility. The restrictions imposed on U.S. users could have led to missed opportunities ranging from $1.84 billion to an undisclosed amount. This report sheds light on the financial implications of geoblocking practices in the cryptocurrency industry.

news.headline: Open-Source AI Foundation launches 20% Project using Agentic AI for criminal justice reform. AUSTIN, March 12, 2025.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas on March 12, 2025, The Open-Source AI Foundation (O-SAIF) unveiled The 20% Project, a pioneering endeavor that utilizes open-source Agentic AI to revolutionize case review processes in the criminal justice system. This initiative aims to enhance efficiency and accuracy in legal procedures by harnessing the power of AI technology.

news.headline: RedHill Biopharma progresses in Crohn's disease program with Phase 2 study of RHB-2041 for MAP-positive CD patients, focusing on mucosal healing and infection eradication.
news.summary: The upcoming Phase 2 trial for RHB-2041 is set to be groundbreaking as it will be the first clinical study focusing on Crohn's Disease (CD) patients who are all confirmed to be MAP-positive. The study aims to establish a correlation between mucosal healing and the eradication of MAP2 infection by introducing unique endpoints and advanced imaging techniques. Discussions for Type C approval are underway to pave the way for this innovative study.

news.headline: Catalina Snacks names Elias Aoukar as Chief Supply Chain Officer for operational boost amid rapid growth.
news.summary: Elias Aoukar has been appointed as the Chief Supply Chain Officer for Catalina Snacks, a prominent player in the better-for-you Snacks and Cereals sector. With a proven track record in scaling operations and enhancing efficiency for rapidly expanding brands, Aoukar is set to bring his expertise to the company. The announcement was made on March 12, 2025, in Indianapolis. This move aims to bolster Catalina Snacks' operations and drive growth in the competitive market landscape.

news.headline: Unilever Food Solutions reveals 4 key food trends for 2025, including the rise of Asian flavors in the global market.
news.summary: In Rotterdam, Netherlands and London on March 12, 2025, Unilever Food Solutions (UFS) announced the launch of its third annual Future Menus report, focusing on four primary food service trends for the year. The latest research indicates a shift towards Asian flavors supplanting traditional European culinary styles. This initiative aims to keep up with the evolving preferences with in-depth analysis showcasing this transition.

news.headline: TrueBlue selected among 2025 World's Most Ethical Companies® by Ethisphere for ethical practices and compliance. #TBI
news.summary: TrueBlue, a prominent supplier of specialized workforce solutions, has been acknowledged by Ethisphere for its exemplary ethical business practices, compliance, and governance programs. This recognition underscores TrueBlue's leadership in maintaining high standards. As of March 12, 2025, TrueBlue, traded on NYSE under the symbol TBI, continues to demonstrate its commitment to ethical operations and responsible governance.

news.headline: Private markets show short-term concerns but strong long-term fundamentals, highlighted in 2025 Hamilton Lane report. Growth potential in evergreen.
news.summary: A recent study has identified certain worrisome trends in private markets in the near future, but remains optimistic about the overall long-term prospects. The report emphasizes the significant potential for growth in the evergreen sector. The research, conducted by Hamilton Lane (Nasdaq: HLNE) and released on March 12, 2025, indicates potential challenges in the short term while highlighting positive fundamentals for sustained growth.

news.summary: The Honor Society by the National Education Equity Lab recognizes exceptional student accomplishments in college credit courses from top institutions, showcasing academic excellence in low-income high schools nationwide. This expansion signifies Capital Group's continued commitment to providing a diverse range of investment opportunities for its clients. The launch occurred on March 12, 2025, in Los Angeles.

news.headline: Storyful launches Headstart: affordable intel for agencies. New service provides concise insights to win pitches. AoP: March 12, 2025

This service aims to aid agencies in winning pitches by offering quick and impactful research support. The announcement was made in New York on March 12, 2025. news.summary: The leading assisted stretching franchise, Stretch Zone, has recently opened its latest location in SAINT JOHNS, Fla., on March 12, 2025. Known for its innovative patented strapping system on exclusive tables, the brand continues to expand its reach.

news.headline: Life Time expands access to LTH-branded supplements on Amazon, offering rigorously tested protein powders, electrolytes, fish oil. #LTH #Amazon
news.summary: Recently, Life Time, a leading healthy lifestyle brand based in CHANHASSEN, Minnesota, has broadened the availability of their rigorously tested products. These include LTH protein powders, electrolytes, fish oil, and more. The company announced this move on March 12, 2025. Life Time is publicly traded under the ticker symbol NYSE: LTH. Their product line is backed by research and is known for its high quality and reliability.

news.headline: iRobot appoints Neal P. Goldman to board of directors, expanding size to nine. Goldman brings financial expertise.
news.summary: iRobot Corp. (NASDAQ: IRBT), a prominent consumer robotics company, recently appointed Neal P. Goldman to its board of directors. The addition of Goldman brings the total number of board members to nine. Known for his successful oversight of operational and financial transformations, Goldman is expected to contribute valuable expertise to the company. The announcement was made on March 12, 2025, in Bedford, Massachusetts. Goldman's proven track record indicates a promising future for iRobot Corp.

news.headline: ZIM reported impressive full year 2024 results, with revenues of $8.43B, net income of $2.15B, and achieved 14% volume growth. For 2025, they expect Adjusted EBITDA between $1.6B - $2.2B and Adjusted EBIT between $350M - $950M. CEO noted strong financial results and fleet transformation driving market share gains. Conference call at 8:00 AM ET to review results. Annual Report available on ZIM website. Focused on ESG values and innovative seaborne transportation services.
news.summary: ZIM Integrated Shipping Services Ltd. reported robust financial results for 2024 with full-year revenues of $8.43 billion, net income of $2.15 billion, Adjusted EBITDA of $3.69 billion, and Adjusted EBIT of $2.55 billion. The company saw a 14% volume growth, reaching 982 thousand TEUs in Q4 2024. ZIM's performance included generated margins of 26% for net income, 44% for Adjusted EBITDA, and 30% for Adjusted EBIT. A Q4 2024 dividend of $382 million was declared, representing 45% of the full year net income. The 2025 outlook predicts Adjusted EBITDA within $1.6-2.2 billion and Adjusted EBIT $350 million to $950 million. Net debt decreased to $2.88 billion, with a net leverage ratio of 0.8x by the end of 2024.CEO Eli Glickman highlighted the exceptional profitability and record carried volume achieved in 2024. The company's fleet transformation resulted in strong financial results and market share gains. The liquidity, cash flows, and capital allocation were well managed. ZIM projects a resilient business for 2025 despite industry volatility. The Annual Report on Form 20-F is available for further details on the company's performance. ZIM, established in 1945 Israel, is a leading global container liner shipping company.

news.headline: Iridium partners with World Central Kitchen for global relief efforts on March 12, 2025. #IRDM
news.summary: On March 12, 2025, Iridium Communications Inc., a prominent company in global voice and data satellite communications listed on Nasdaq as IRDM, revealed a significant collaboration with World Central Kitchen (WCK). The partnership aims to support WCK in its mission to offer aid in times of need.

news.headline: Amarin reports 4Q 2024 revenue of $62.3M, expenses at $43.0M, and a year-end cash position of $294.2M. Ratio change announced for Nasdaq listing maintenance. Company emphasizes strategic focus and global growth momentum of VASCEPA franchise. Jumps in net revenue from European markets, as in Italy and China. In 2024, 45 publications on VASCEPA benefits were presented, showing its cardiovascular benefits. 4Q 2024 Financials: Revenue -17% at $62.3M; U.S. $44.2M, Europe $4.0M, RoW $11.9M. Non-GAAP net loss for 4Q was $8.7M. Amarin aims to maximize VASCEPA reach and capital.
news.summary: Amarin Corporation plc reported total revenues of $62.3 million and operating expenses of $43.0 million for the fourth quarter of 2024, with a year-end cash position of $294.2 million. Despite facing challenges like generic market competition in the U.S., the company generated over $200 million in revenue in 2024 and maintained a strong cash balance with no debt. The focus on strategic initiatives, operational efficiency, and global expansion of the VASCEPA/VAZKEPA franchise contributed to the financial performance. A 1-for-20 ADS ratio change was announced to maintain Nasdaq listing. The company continues to advance commercialization efforts in Europe and global markets, while investing in R&D to demonstrate the benefits of VASCEPA/VAZKEPA. Financially, there was a decrease in net revenue compared to the same period in 2023, attributed to lower selling prices and volume. The company reaffirms its commitment to maximizing revenue streams, managing expenses, and expanding market reach to support ongoing operations.
